title: Sweet & Crispy Syrian White Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A sick-day dish featuring sweet and crispy white cabbage in a flavorful sauce that's perfect for making on the stove.

ingredients.name: sugar (or honey for a touch of sweetness)

instructions: Wash and thinly slice the white cabbage.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant but not browned.
Add tomato paste, stirring continuously to prevent burning. Cook for about 1 minute.
Pour in apple cider vinegar, sugar, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine all the ingredients into a sauce.
Add sliced cabbage to the pan. Cover with a lid or foil and cook for about 3-5 minutes or until cabbage is tender but still crisp.
Stir in thyme leaves and garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
